allow: Bash(python -c "from examples.entsoe_smib_demo import build_entsoe_smib_system, compute_smib_voltages, get_external_reactance; s = build_entsoe_smib_system\(\); print\('build OK'\); gen = s['generator']; X_ext = get_external_reactance\(s\); print\(f'X_ext={X_ext:.4f}, X_total={gen.Xd_prime+X_ext:.4f}'\); Vt, Pe, _ = compute_smib_voltages\(0.686, 1.055, gen, X_ext, False, 1.05\); print\(f'Vt={Vt:.4f} \(expect ~0.991\), Pe={Pe:.4f} \(expect ~0.95\)'\)")
